title: selysia bidentata
intro: Selysia bidentata, also known as the two-toothed fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Adiantaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selysia bidentata include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe irritated tissues, and promote relaxation. Selysia bidentata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations also include tinctures and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
